name: atlan
description: Atlan is the context layer for enterprise AI. Connect Cursor to your organization's context repos — the knowledge, data, and semantics your AI agents need to build effectively. Use Atlan's agent skills to search & discover enterprise context, traverse end-to-end lineage, access governed data definitions and glossaries, execute SQL, curate your metadata graph, and ensure data quality — so every coding task in Cursor is grounded in trusted organizational context.
